seoTitle: Lake Ninan vs Lake Wells — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Lake Ninan and Lake Wells. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Lake Ninan vs Lake Wells: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Lake Ninan and Lake Wells.
heading: Lake Ninan vs Lake Wells — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Lake Ninan, Western Australia and Lake Wells, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Lake Wells has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Lake Ninan (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Lake Ninan or Lake Wells safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Lake Ninan has a flood risk score of 48/100, while Lake Wells scores 22/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Lake Ninan scores 33/100 for bushfire risk. Lake Wells scores 53/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Lake Ninan or Lake Wells?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Lake Wells has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.15% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
